examples: Why, the argument goes, should a car-driving pensioner from Lincolnshire have to subsidise the daily commute of a stockbroker from Surrey?
"As a pensioner, I get seen immediately," he says.
Plucking up courage, the man approaches the pensioner.
The Borders pensioner had admitted committing the offence in her home on Monday afternoon.
The man accused of murdering a Perthshire pensioner has had three other charges against him dropped.
